Andrographis paniculata is a plant used in traditional medicine in Asia. It has been reported to have various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help in reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The bioactive constituents of Andrographis paniculata include andrographolide, andrographisne, androisoandrographolide, and neoandrographolide. The most common herbal preparations made with Andrographis paniculata include capsules, tablets, and tea, which are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
